name: Penne Carbonara
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute pancetta until transparent. Set aside.
2. Cook pasta al dente. Drain and return to the pot.
3. Add bacon pancetta and its fat, eggs, both cheeses, and pepper to the pasta.
4. Cook over very low heat, stirring constantly. Keep the mixture moving in the pot so that the eggs do not scramble. You may need to take the pot off the heat occasionally.
5. A thin sauce should form on the noodles. Serve immediately.
Note: Pancetta is Italian-style bacon. Pecorino Romano is an Italian hard cheese made from goat's milk. The best substitute is Parmesan.
